details.test: Task 1: Add 8+ channel mixer under $500 with 4+ stars (qty 2)
Task 2: Select mixer with most channels under $700 and add to cart
Task 3: Create mixer bundle with case and two XLR cables and add to cart
Task 4: Compare analog and digital FX mixers (12+ ch) and add cheaper with 3-year warranty
Task 5: Choose mixer for pickup within 5 days in ZIP 10001 (middle-priced of first three)
Task 6: Configure 12-month financing with < $40/month and add mixer to cart
Task 7: Ask noise-related question on a live sound mixer with recent noise review
Task 8: Filter by inputs, aux outputs, weight, price and add mixer to cart
Task 9: Add first two mixers to cart and move cheaper to save-for-later
